name: Dragon Knight
description: The Dragon Slyrak sleeps within this armor, and the knight within the Dragon waits.

abilities.name: Dragon Blood
abilities.description: The Eldwurm-blood infused knight in dragon form has nigh impenetrable armor and health regeneration.

abilities.name: Breathe Fire
abilities.description: Unleashes a breath of fire in front of Dragon Knight that burns enemies and reduces the damage their attacks deal.

abilities.name: Dragon Tail
abilities.description: Smites an enemy unit in melee range with his shield, stunning it while dealing minor damage.

abilities.name: Wyrm's Wrath
abilities.description: The life blood of the Dragon improves Dragon Knight's abilities and items to have increased Ao E and causes his attacks to deal additional magic damage to enemy units.

abilities.name: Fireball
abilities.description: Dealing damage over time within the radius. Has reduced cast range in human form.

abilities.name: Elder Dragon Form
abilities.description: Increases the current level of Dragon Form by one. Adds a Level 4 Black Dragon that has free pathing, bonus magic resistance, and increased other bonuses. Grants bonus according to the caster's attack range type.
